hooks.name: block-test-files
hooks.description: Block creation of test/mock/stub files. lynx Iron Rule: no test frameworks.

hooks.name: mock-detection
hooks.description: Detect mock/stub patterns in code being written. Hard-blocks on match.

hooks.name: validation-not-compilation
hooks.description: Remind that build success is NOT validation. Fires after successful builds.

hooks.name: evidence-gate-reminder
hooks.description: Inject evidence checklist when marking a task/todo complete.

hooks.name: completion-claim-validator
hooks.description: Block completion claims that lack fresh validation evidence in e2e-evidence/.
